frames.description: Street level view in Kolkata. In the foreground, the front portion of a yellow Hindustan Ambassador taxi is visible. To the right, there's a weathered concrete wall topped with a decorative metal fence. A large campaign banner is fixed to the fence. A blue and white metal police barrier stands on the brick-paved sidewalk. Trees and buildings are visible behind the fence. Overhead utility wires crisscross the sky.

The yellow taxi has moved further into the frame, obscuring more of the wall. The camera appears to be tracking the movement or panning right. The banner on the wall is clearly visible, showing portraits of several political figures and Bengali text. The police barrier remains in place.

The yellow taxi is now on the right side of the frame, moving out of view. The camera focus remains on the wall and the barrier. The banner transcriptions are: Bengali: 'ধর্মতলা L.I.C বিল্ডিং চলো' (English: 'Dharmatala L.I.C Building Let's go'). Small text at the bottom says 'Courtesy : Ward 44 INTTUC'.

The taxi has completely exited the frame. The scene is centered on the wall and the large banner. The blue and white barrier is prominently displayed, marked with 'KP' (Kolkata Police) in blue on the white center section.
A slight change in perspective as the camera continues to pan right. The wall and fence continue into the distance. The lighting suggests a bright, sunny day with some haze.
Continuing the pan along the wall. More of the decorative fence pattern is visible. Lush green trees are growing behind the fence, partially obscuring the buildings in the background.
The camera continues its rightward movement along the wall. The banner on the fence remains visible in the upper right. The brick-paved sidewalk is empty of pedestrians so far.
A man wearing a white shirt and dark pants enters the frame from the left, walking on the sidewalk. The camera continues to move right.
The man in the white shirt is now walking past the center of the frame. The wall and fence are still the main background features.
The pedestrian continues walking to the right. The perspective shifts further along the wall, showing more of the sidewalk and the base of the wall.
The man in white is still visible on the right. A second person, a man in a light blue shirt, enters from the left on a bicycle. The camera is approaching a corner or intersection.

The camera is turning the corner. A traffic light pole with a red signal is visible. On the right, a narrow side street opens up. A man on a bicycle is riding toward the intersection. A blue sign on a pole says 'NO LEFT TURN'.

The camera has turned right, looking down a narrow street lined with tall, older buildings. A man in a light blue shirt is riding a bicycle in the foreground. A truck is parked further down the street. Various signs and posters are attached to buildings and poles.
A rapid turn to the right shows a traffic light with a red lamp glowing. Lush trees are clustered around the intersection. A man on a bicycle is passing through the bottom of the frame.

The camera pans across a row of shops. A blue sign with white and orange text says 'CEAT'. Next to it is a purple sign for 'apollo'. Further right, a 'Bank of Baroda' sign is visible with its orange logo and name in Hindi 'बैंक ऑफ़ বड़োদা' and English 'Bank of Baroda'. Orange political flags are placed along the railing.

More shop fronts are revealed. A blue 'IndiGo' banner is seen above 'GAYATRI TRAVELS'. Below is 'PHARMA PRO - Professional Chemist Store'. The address '12 C. R. AVENUE KOLKATA - 700013' is visible. A pedestrian woman in a pink and white saree is walking right. A red motorcycle is parked on the sidewalk.

A black SUV is passing in front of several shop fronts. Orange political flags (BJP) are visible. A blue metal railing separates the sidewalk from the road. Various small circular brand logos are on a signboard.

A yellow mobile mechanical hoist or engine is positioned on the sidewalk. Two men are standing near it. A black motorcycle is parked nearby. An 'Airtel' sign in green and orange is visible in the background.

The focus is on large political banners. One bright green and orange banner features Narendra Modi and other BJP leaders with the slogan in Hindi 'सबকা সাথ, সবকা বিকাশ' (English: 'Everyone's support, everyone's development'). Pedestrians are walking by, and some are sitting at a small stall on the left.

A shop named 'FIRE SHIELD ENGINEERING EQUIPMENTS' is visible. The sign lists the address as '113A, CHITTARANJAN AVENUE, KOLKATA-700073'. A maroon scooter and a dark car are parked on the street. A man in a red shirt is walking past.
A health-related business named 'Naturopath HEALTH WORLD' is shown. A red Mahindra Thar SUV and a white Mahindra Scorpio are parked in front. A banner for 'Zilax ADVANCED' is also visible.

An entrance to a narrow lane is framed by a green fabric gateway. Several cycle trolleys are loaded with large yellow and white packaged bundles. A large BJP campaign banner is on the right. A white car is partially visible.

Moving along the main road, the side of a brown delivery truck is in view. Behind it, shops are visible, including 'AVENUE SCIENTIFIC HOUSE'. A blue sign with white Bengali text 'আই সি আই সি আই ব্যাঙ্ক' and English 'ICICI Bank' logo is partially seen.

A clear view of an 'ICICI Bank' branch. The sign says 'আই সি আই সি আই ব্যাঙ্ক' (Bengali for ICICI Bank) and 'ICICI Bank C. R. Avenue Branch'. Other nearby shops include 'DEB SCIENTIFIC' and 'RITA MEDICAL SUPPLY AGENCY'. A black sedan and a white hatchback are parked along the curb.

The camera pans past a pink building with large windows protected by iron grills. Barbed wire runs along the top of a black metal fence in front. A white sedan is parked on the street. A man in white traditional attire is walking toward an entrance.

A wide shot of the pink building's facade. It has multiple windows with decorative grills and several external air conditioning units. The blue and white city railing continues along the sidewalk. A small yellow sign is attached to the fence.
Continuing past the same pink building. The pattern of the window grills is repetitive. Tall street lamps with multiple globes are placed periodically. Some clothing is hanging on the fence to dry.
A man on a motorcycle, wearing a red shirt and blue helmet, crosses the frame from right to left. The pink building remains the primary background. A blue and white poster is stuck to a lamp post.
The roof of a white car passes through the foreground, partially obscuring the view of the sidewalk and the lower part of the pink building. A person in a pink shirt is on a motorcycle on the right.
The camera movement continues past the pink building. The roof of the white car is still visible in the foreground. Pedestrians and motorcycles are seen in the distance on the sidewalk.
